dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's today's system overview.

videoLab.heroTitle: Create multi-platform video analysis projects with links or uploads
videoLab.heroDesc: The workspace now supports two input modes: video links and local uploads. The first version generates a structured breakdown from the detected platform or uploaded file, and can later be extended with real download, ASR, and OCR pipelines.
videoLab.sessionDesc: Backend token is saved in the browser Cookie.
videoLab.createProjectDesc: Use TikTok, Douyin, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili links, or upload a local video.
videoLab.videoLinkPlaceholder: https://www.tiktok.com/video/... or another supported video URL
videoLab.uploadHint: Supported: mp4, mov, mkv, webm, avi, m4v, mpeg, mpg
videoLab.objectivePlaceholder: e.g., Extract full script, captions and output a remake plan
videoLab.projectListDesc: Click a project to view full script and remake plan.
videoLab.noProjects: No projects yet. Create a TikTok video analysis task first.
videoLab.selectProject: Select a project to view details
videoLab.detailPlaceholder: Full script, captions and remake plan will appear here.
videoLab.caption: Captions
videoLab.emptyHint: Create a project or select one from the list.
videoLab.errorNoFile: Please choose a local video file
videoLab.errorTitleShort: Title must be at least 3 characters
videoLab.errorObjectiveShort: Objective must be at least 8 characters

login.subtitle: Sign in to your TikTok script workspace
login.errorEmailRequired: Please enter your email or username
login.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.loginFailed: Login failed, please try again later

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Register and start extracting TikTok scripts
register.errorNameShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
register.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later

forgotPassword.heroTitle: Get a reset token and recover your password.
forgotPassword.heroDesc: The project doesn't have email service yet, so the backend will return the reset token and redirect URL directly for local development.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.desc: Enter your registered email to generate a local reset link.

resetPassword.heroTitle: Set a new password with the token and return to login.
resetPassword.heroDesc: This page reads the `token` parameter from the URL. You can also paste it manually. After reset, all old login tokens will be invalidated.
resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.desc: Enter the reset token and a new password.
resetPassword.errorPasswordShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.success: Password has been reset. Redirecting to login...

analysis.heroTitle: Analyze, Remake or Create Viral Videos
analysis.descScript: Extract the full script, narration, captions, and visual descriptions from any video.
analysis.descRemake: Recreate the visual details of a video, including composition, color, and lighting.
analysis.descCreate: AI generates a complete viral video production plan based on your product or theme.
analysis.prefillScript: Extract the full text script from this video, including dialogue, narration, and all on-screen captions:
analysis.prefillRemake: Recreate the visual details of this video, including composition, color, and lighting:
analysis.prefillCreate:
I want to create this type of video: [UGC seeding/Product talking head/Product demo/Pain point to solution/Before and after/Reaction showcase/Storytelling]
My target audience: [ethnicity/region/occupation/physical traits/etc.]
My product name:
My product selling points:
My preferred video style:
analysis.inputPlaceholder: Upload a video or paste a video link, then describe what you want to extract or remake. If a project is already selected, this prompt will refresh it.
analysis.missingSource: Upload a video, paste a video link, or choose an existing project before sending.
analysis.emptyResult: Upload a video or add a link, then send the prompt to start a real analysis run.
